## Caveats carried forward

1. **High-severity transitive prod-dep vulns** (`multer`, `next`, `lodash`, `js-yaml`, `@nestjs/core`) ‚Äî inherit auth-UoW NFR-S08 ACCEPTED-WITH-DEFERRED-REMEDIATION; the `roles-profile` UoW introduced **zero new dependencies**. Re-audit at Gate #5.
2. **Live Playwright e2e** ‚Äî 3 specs written (`signup-role.e2e.ts`, `profile.e2e.ts`, amended `full-flow.e2e.ts`) but not yet executed against running BE+FE in CI. Will be wired into CI at Stage 15 (Build & Test). HTML inspection at Stage 14 confirmed all referenced test-IDs exist.
3. **Live axe-core scan** on `/signup`, `/dashboard`, `/profile`, `/account-setup` deferred ‚Äî `@axe-core/playwright` is declared in `apps/frontend/package.json` but not installed in `node_modules`. Static a11y verified at Stage 13 (paired `<label>`, `aria-describedby`/`aria-invalid`, unique `<h1>` per route, `aria-live="polite"`, `aria-label` on the badge). Same disposition as the auth-UoW SC-14.
4. **`apps/frontend/.eslintrc.json` recreated** during Stage 12 because `next lint` complained no config existed. The recreated rules (`next/core-web-vitals` + `jsx-a11y/recommended` + `no-console: error`) match what the auth cycle-1 was lint-passing under.
